title: Questions from Quarantine: The Ideal School Opening Policy
summary: The Security and Global Health Project is proud to present a weekly web series with Security Mom Juliette Kayyem and Medicine Mom Dr. Margaret Bourdeaux. Each week our experts will answer your questions from quarantine and give you advice on staying sane and sanitary in a global crisis. We hope you'll join our Moms every Tuesday and if you have a question that you want answered tweet with #QuestionsFromQuarantine.
body: The Security and Global Health Project is proud to present a weekly web series with Security Mom Juliette Kayyem and Medicine Mom Dr. Margaret Bourdeaux. Each week our experts will answer your questions from quarantine and give you advice on staying sane and sanitary in a global crisis. We hope you'll join our Moms every Tuesday and if you have a question that you want answered tweet with #QuestionsFromQuarantine . _list.source: Belfer Center for Science and International Affairs, Harvard Kennedy School

result.main_content_en: The article introduces a weekly web series titled 'Questions from Quarantine,' featuring experts Juliette Kayyem and Dr. Margaret Bourdeaux, who provide advice on managing life during a global health crisis. It specifically highlights an episode focused on 'The Ideal School Opening Policy,' indicating a discussion on public health strategies for safely reopening educational institutions amidst the pandemic. The series invites public participation through social media using a dedicated hashtag. The broader context includes related expert analyses on topics such as mass migration, school reopening timelines, mega-event safety, supply chain management, and global health threats like H3N2, positioning the discussion within a framework of science, technology, and global policy responses to emerging challenges.
result.main_content_zh: 本文介绍了一个名为“隔离期问题”的每周网络系列节目，由专家朱丽叶·凯耶姆和玛格丽特·布尔多博士主持，就全球健康危机期间的生活管理提供建议。文章特别强调了一期关于“理想的学校开放政策”的节目，这表明了对疫情中安全重新开放教育机构的公共卫生策略的讨论。该系列通过专用标签邀请公众在社交媒体上参与。更广泛的背景包括相关专家对大规模移民、学校重新开放时间表、大型活动安全、供应链管理以及H3N2等全球健康威胁的分析，将讨论置于科学、技术和全球政策应对新兴挑战的框架内。
